description: Feature flag management and A/B testing platforms for controlled, gradual feature rollouts.

entries.name: LaunchDarkly
entries.summary: The most established feature flag management platform, with targeting rules, experimentation, and audit logs.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for up to 1,000 monthly context instances (small projects).

entries.name: PostHog Feature Flags
entries.summary: Feature flagging built into the broader PostHog product analytics suite, with usage-based pricing.
entries.freeTier: 1M flag requests/month free (shared with PostHog's overall free event quota).

entries.name: Flagsmith
entries.summary: Open-source feature flag and remote config platform, self-hostable or managed cloud.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted fully free; cloud free tier includes 50,000 API requests/month.

entries.name: Unleash
entries.summary: Open-source feature flag platform built for enterprise-scale rollouts, with a strong self-hosted option.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted Open Source edition fully free; Unleash Cloud free tier for small teams.

entries.name: Statsig
entries.summary: Feature flags, experimentation, and product analytics in one platform, built by ex-Facebook engineers.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with generous monthly event allowance.

entries.name: GrowthBook
entries.summary: Open-source feature flagging and A/B testing platform with a focus on warehouse-native analytics.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted fully free; cloud free tier for small teams.
